features: Added shared job timeline / audit trail helpers for patrol requests and reports
Timeline shows client request, dispatch assignment, guard acceptance, patrol start, proof upload, completion, proof review, report publishing, and client view/download events
Added timeline panels to Guard Active Job, Guard Completed Jobs, Report Builder, Report Archive, and Client Reports preview

Added local audit capture for client patrol requests, dispatch assignments, guard workflow stages, proof uploads, proof reviews, report drafts, report publishing, client report views, and client report downloads
Added Export Timeline CSV action for selected jobs
Preserved v3.0.74 global dashboard/report/proof logic sync
Preserved v3.0.73 workflow status unification and v3.0.72 report/proof count clarity
